message:
Track progress in beads

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@
 {"id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.4","title":"Permissions + fallback UX for pcap","description":"Deliverables:
- Detect missing privileges (sudo/CAP_NET_RAW) and log explicit warning.
- Auto-fallback to PTR without error exit.
- Clear log messages about capture mode in banner + JSON meta.

Notes:
- Must avoid noisy logs for non-pcap users.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-17T22:00:47.439484080Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T01:20:05.008435116Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T01:20:05.008435116Z","close_reason":"Closed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.4","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.4","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.5","title":"Tests + fixtures for pcap capture","description":"Deliverables:
- Comprehensive unit tests for DNS + SNI parsing, mapping TTL/eviction, and error paths.
- Fixture-based tests using small deterministic pcaps (offline, no root).
- CI job that runs feature-flag tests.
- Test logs must include inputs, decoded domains, and mapping outcomes for auditability.

Notes:
- Use offline pcap fixtures to keep tests deterministic and privilege-free.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-17T22:00:47.477466960Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T10:52:13.818262418Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T10:52:13.818221391Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.5","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.5","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.6","title":"Docs update: pcap mode","description":"Deliverables:
- README update describing pcap feature, capture modes, and fallback behavior.
- CLI help text examples and troubleshooting steps.
- Reference the e2e script and its log output location for verification.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-17T22:00:47.514480509Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-17T22:04:58.500503240Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.6","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.6","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.6","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.6","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"}]}
-{"id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.7","title":"E2E: pcap attribution + fallback logging","description":"Deliverables:
- E2E script that replays offline pcap fixtures with `--pcap` and validates domain attribution.
- Explicit test case for privilege failure → warning + PTR fallback.
- Use shared e2e harness/log format.
- Log file must include: input fixture, expected domains, actual output, and fallback warnings.

Notes:
- Must run without root by using offline pcaps only.
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-17T22:04:02.705396614Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-17T22:06:56.599358963Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.7","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.7","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.7","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.7","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"}]}
+{"id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.7","title":"E2E: pcap attribution + fallback logging","description":"Deliverables:
- E2E script that replays offline pcap fixtures with `--pcap` and validates domain attribution.
- Explicit test case for privilege failure → warning + PTR fallback.
- Use shared e2e harness/log format.
- Log file must include: input fixture, expected domains, actual output, and fallback warnings.

Notes:
- Must run without root by using offline pcaps only.
","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-17T22:04:02.705396614Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T17:07:26.427761442Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.7","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.7","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.7","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.7","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.8","title":"CI: build/test matrix for pcap feature","description":"Deliverables:
- CI job builds with `--features pcap` to ensure feature-gated code compiles.
- Test job runs offline pcap fixture tests (no root).
- Clear CI log markers indicating pcap feature coverage.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-17T22:06:24.203513592Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-17T22:06:24.203513592Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.8","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.8","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.8","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.2","title":"SQLite report subcommand","description":"Purpose:
- Turn SQLite logs into actionable insights without live monitoring.

User impact:
- Users can summarize sessions, compare providers, and inspect top domains/ports after the fact.

Constraints:
- Must work with existing schema/views and degrade gracefully if missing.

Testing:
- Unit tests for query logic + formatting.
- E2E script that seeds a fixture DB and validates report output (pretty + JSON).
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-17T22:00:47.550931262Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-20T04:07:18.010503566Z","closed_at":"2026-01-20T04:07:18.010503566Z","close_reason":"All implementation subtasks complete. Only P3 docs updates remaining.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.2","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.2.1","title":"Design report UX + query plan","description":"Deliverables:
- CLI design (`rano report --latest`, `--run-id`, `--since`, `--until`).
- Define time range semantics (UTC vs local, inclusive/exclusive bounds).
- Decide which views/queries power each report section and top-N ordering.
- Define compatibility behavior when views/tables are missing (fallback or warning).
- Output format for pretty + JSON (stable keys, deterministic ordering).
","design":"-","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-17T22:00:47.586373210Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-20T02:35:04.276935532Z","closed_at":"2026-01-20T02:35:04.276935532Z","close_reason":"Design document complete in docs/report-design.md. Covers: CLI design (--latest, --run-id, --since, --until, --json), time range semantics (RFC3339 UTC, inclusive/exclusive bounds), query mapping per section, compatibility/fallback behavior for missing tables/views, and JSON output format with stable keys and deterministic ordering.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.2.1","depends_on_id":"rust_agent_network_observer-35w.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:47Z","created_by":"import"}]}
